video.label: Parent Reassurance
video.placeholder: Founder addresses parents directly — safety, accommodation, monitoring, communication, costs

items.question: Can I study in China without speaking Chinese?
items.answer: Yes. Most programs for international students are taught in English. We also help you find the right English-taught programs aligned with your goals.

items.question: How much budget do I need?
items.answer: With our scholarship optimization, many students reduce costs significantly. We map out the full budget from tuition to living costs before you commit.

items.question: What are my scholarship chances?
items.answer: We analyze your profile and match you with scholarships you actually qualify for — including CSC, university-level, and bilateral scholarships Algeria-China.

items.question: What if my visa gets rejected?
items.answer: We prepare your file to minimize rejection risk. Our visa approval rate is high because we don't submit until the file is optimized.

items.question: Are Chinese degrees recognized in Algeria?
items.answer: Yes. Degrees from accredited Chinese universities are recognized in Algeria and internationally, especially in medicine, engineering, and business.

items.question: Can I work while studying in China?
items.answer: International students on student visas have limited work options. We advise you on what's allowed and how to plan financially.

urgency.description: Scholarship seats are strictly limited and embassy appointments become scarce. Don't wait until it's too late.
